attributes.description: Stage in the major-gift cultivation cycle.
attributes.name: cultivationStage
attributes.usage: Drives major-gift pipeline reporting. Distinct from Opportunity stage (which tracks gift-level lifecycle); cultivation stage tracks the relationship-level cycle that may span multiple gifts.

attributes.description: The contact (typically a board member or peer-influencer) who solicited the gift.
attributes.name: solicitor
attributes.usage: Drives peer-solicitor reporting and recognition. Distinct from the major-gift officer (a User / staff member) who manages the relationship.

attributes.description: The staff member responsible for the donor relationship.
attributes.name: stewardshipOfficer
attributes.usage: Drives major-gift staff workload reports and ensures every major donor has a dedicated relationship manager.

attributes.description: Whether this major gift was given in tribute to someone.
attributes.name: tributeType
attributes.usage: Triggers tribute-acknowledgment workflows where the honoree (or honoree's family) is notified of the gift. Common at funerals (memorial gifts) and milestone events (honor gifts).

attributes.description: Name of the person being honored or memorialized.
attributes.name: tributeName
attributes.usage: Free-text field for the honoree's name. May or may not be a Contact in the system.

attributes.description: Donor's preferred level of public recognition for this gift.
attributes.name: recognitionPreference
attributes.usage: Drives annual-report listing logic, donor-event invitations, and major-gift announcement workflows. Anonymous gifts are excluded from public recognition lists.

business_context: Major Gift records add cultivation and stewardship attributes on top of the standard Donation entity. The threshold definition is policy-driven per organization — some shops define major gifts as gifts $5,000+; others $25,000+; others $100,000+. Below the threshold, donations get standard processing; above, they trigger custom workflows: major-gift officer assignment, personal thank-you call within 48 hours, recognition in the annual report (with permission), invitation to donor events, and ongoing relationship management. NPSP ships a Major Gift Record Type on Opportunity. CiviCRM customers typically add a custom field on Contribution (financial_type=Major Gift, plus custom solicitor and stewardship-officer fields). Bloomerang uses Custom Fields on Transaction with Major Gift designation. The B2B systems would build this out as part of full nonprofit customization. The subclass matters because it formalizes the threshold-driven cultivation pattern rather than leaving it implicit in custom fields. When interviewing clients, surface "Major Gift" specifically (rather than just "Donation") when they have dedicated major-gift staff, when they need cultivation-stage tracking on top of donation status, or when major gifts trigger different acknowledgment workflows than standard gifts.
name: Major Gift (Donation subclass)
purpose: A subclass of Donation representing a high-value gift that warrants distinct cultivation, stewardship, and acknowledgment workflows. Threshold for "major gift" varies by organization (commonly $1,000 / $10,000 / $25,000 / $100,000) but the operational distinction is the same: major gifts justify dedicated cultivation officers, multi-touch stewardship plans, and personalized acknowledgment beyond the standard receipt.

relationships.description: A major gift has a solicitor (peer-influencer) contact distinct from the donor.
A major gift has a stewardship officer (User / staff member).

sources.title: Salesforce NPSP: Data Model Gallery (Major Gift Record Type)

systems.name: Custom Major Gift object or Type attribute on Deals
systems.notes: Attio supports either a custom Major Gift object or a Type attribute on the Deals object.

systems.name: Transaction with custom Type=Major Gift
systems.notes: Custom Field on Transaction marking it as a Major Gift, plus custom Solicitor and Stewardship Officer attributes.

systems.name: Contribution with custom financial_type=Major Gift
systems.notes: CiviCRM uses financial_type_id on Contribution as a discriminator. Major Gift is added as a custom financial_type with custom fields for cultivation stage and assigned solicitor.

systems.name: Opportunity with type=Major Gift (custom enum)
systems.notes: Custom enum value on Opportunity.type plus custom cultivation fields.

systems.name: Deal with custom Type=Major Gift
systems.notes: HubSpot has no Record Type concept. Implemented via custom Deal Type property and custom cultivation-stage properties.

systems.name: Opportunity with custom Major Gift Record Type
systems.notes: Customers without NPSP add a custom Major Gift Record Type to Opportunity along with custom cultivation-stage and stewardship-officer fields.

systems.name: Opportunity with Major Gift Record Type
systems.notes: NPSP ships a Major Gift Record Type. Used by major-gift teams alongside the Donation Record Type. Major Gift typically has a higher amount threshold and triggers different cultivation workflows.
